description_long: This is a futuristic, compact airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and a forward-placed, dark-tinted cockpit canopy. The wings are mounted mid-fuselage and extend outward with a slight forward sweep, ending in large, blocky engine nacelles or pods that feature prominent red highlights on their inner faces. The body is primarily gray with subtle panel lines and some red and yellow accent markings along the sides, giving it a high-tech, utilitarian appearance. The rear of the airplane is squared off, with two large, rectangular exhaust ports or thrusters visible. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable or integrated into the body. The overall design suggests a vehicle intended for rapid urban deployment or advanced transport in a science fiction setting.
description: A compact, angular gray airplane with a forward cockpit, mid-mounted swept wings ending in red-highlighted engine pods, and a squared rear with large exhausts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, forward cockpit, and detailed panel lines along the body.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin rectangular exhaust ports and the red inner surfaces of the engine pods.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0 with visible accent markings and wing structure.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide, dark cockpit canopy and the prominent red-highlighted engine pods at the wingtips.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with forward-swept, straight wings ending in large, blocky engine pods; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the outer wing pods.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable or integrated.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single large canopy, likely single or dual-seat.
